comments.text: That was exactly what I was trying to do!

comments.author: Steve
comments.text:
I like that framing so much, and you must like it too, due to the emphasis:

**write two maximally-different implementations of your domain, then cross-check**

we should play with this idea in some non-match contexts...go totally extreme

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: I like this phrase: close the universe, minimize the substrate, and the code becomes weather-resistant
